case_title: KIM HOA NGUYEN VS. JONATHAN HUYNH

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, KIM HOA AS TO DEFENDANT HUYNH, JONATHAN INDIVIDUALLY AND AS A GENERAL PARTNER OF VIETNAM, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
